message: Created finding after duplicate-ID queue repair

Moved ModuleValidationResult to the public SafeIR.Validation namespace in a Model subfolder, updated consumer-facing tests and README package docs, and updated the SafeIR.Validation API baseline for explicit immutable accessors. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter PublicEvidenceImmutabilityTests|ProgrammaticIrValidationTests; ./scripts/check-api-compat-baseline.ps1; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1; ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor.
